title: gardenia oudiepe
intro: Gardenia oudiepe is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa, and is also known as the 'Fried Egg Flower' due to its unique yellow center surrounded by white petals. The medicinal properties of Gardenia oudiepe include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are obtained from its essential oil. The health benefits of consuming Gardenia oudiepe include lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Gardenia oudiepe include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headaches, and skin irritations.
